name: Shree Cement Limited
summary: Shree Cement Limited manufactures and sells cement and clinker in India and internationally. It offers cement under the Shee Jung Rodhak, Bangur, Rockstrong, Roofon Concrete Master, and Bangur Power brand names. The company also engages in the generation of power with a total capacity of 742 megawatts through thermal, waste heat recovery, solar, and wind power plants. Shree Cement Limited was incorporated in 1979 and is based in Kolkata, India.
